2604.19477.title: Deep Supervised Contrastive Learning of Pitch Contours for Robust Pitch Accent Classification in Seoul Korean
2604.19477.paper_summary: The intonational structure of Seoul Korean has been defined with discrete tonal categories within the Autosegmental-Metrical model of intonational phonology. However, it is challenging to map continuous $F_0$ contours to these invariant categories due to variable $F_0$ realizations in real-world speech. Our paper proposes Dual-Glob, a deep supervised contrastive learning framework to robustly classify fine-grained pitch accent patterns in Seoul Korean. Unlike conventional local predictive models, our approach captures holistic $F_0$ contour shapes by enforcing structural consistency between clean and augmented views in a shared latent space. To this aim, we introduce the first large-scale benchmark dataset, consisting of manually annotated 10,093 Accentual Phrases in Seoul Korean. Experimental results show that our Dual-Glob significantly outperforms strong baseline models with state-of-the-art accuracy (77.75%) and F1-score (51.54%). Therefore, our work supports AM-based intonational phonology using data-driven methodology, showing that deep contrastive learning effectively captures holistic structural features of continuous $F_0$ contours.
2604.19477.paper_summary_zh: 首爾韓語的語調結構在自段-度量模型的語調音韻學中被定義為離散的音調類別。<lb/>然而，由於現實語音中 $F_0$ 實現的變異性，將連續的 $F_0$ 輪廓映射到這些不變類別是具有挑戰性的。<lb/>我們的論文提出了 Dual-Glob，一個深度監督對比學習框架，用於穩健地分類首爾韓語中的細粒度音調重音模式。<lb/>與傳統的局部預測模型不同，我們的方法通過在共享潛在空間中強制清晰視圖和增強視圖之間的結構一致性來捕捉整體的 $F_0$ 輪廓形狀。<lb/>為此，我們引入了第一個大規模基準數據集，包含手動標註的 10,093 個首爾韓語音調短語。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，我們的 Dual-Glob 在最新的準確率（77.75%）和 F1 分數（51.54%）上顯著超越了強基線模型。<lb/>因此，我們的工作支持基於 AM 的語調音韻學，使用數據驅動的方法論，顯示深度對比學習有效捕捉連續 $F_0$ 輪廓的整體結構特徵。
2604.19477.author: Hyunjung Joo et.al.
